description_long: This object is a whimsical, fantasy-inspired bottle apparatus mounted on a wooden base. The main body is a large, round, translucent blue glass bottle with a bulbous stopper tied with a thick rope. Attached to the bottle is a system of metallic pipes and a cylindrical chamber, featuring a prominent brass valve wheel and a small glass tube. The bottle appears partially filled with a greenish liquid, visible through the transparent glass. The base is wooden, with metal fasteners at the corners, giving the object a sturdy, industrial look. Decorative elements such as the rope and the stylized valve add to its steampunk aesthetic.
description: A large, round, translucent blue glass bottle with a rope-tied stopper, mounted on a wooden base and connected to pipes and a brass valve wheel.
description_view_0: Front view shows the round glass bottle with a rope-tied stopper, the main body, and the start of the pipe system on the right.
description_view_1: Side view highlights the brass valve wheel, the cylindrical chamber, and the pipework attached to the bottle.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the full curvature of the bottle, the attached chamber, and the pipe system extending from the left.
description_view_3: Opposite side view shows the bottle's back, the wooden base, and the rope detail around the neck.
